name: Crockpot Irish Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lamb, boneless, cubed - browned and drained
2 medium Carrots, pared and cut into 1/2-inch slices
10 oz Peas, frozen, or 10 oz Mixed vegetables, frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the cubed lamb with salt and pepper.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except peas to the pot (omit tapioca if you don't want gravy thickened).
3. Stir well.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours.
5. Add peas during the last 1-2 hours of cooking.
